title: Portfolio Architecture Update
content: Started the process of migrating the old portfolio to a modern React frontend with Tailwind CSS to ensure it looks crisp on high DPI screens and boasts improved performance.

title: Venn diagram and 'circles'
author: Rijaul Haque
content: This night, I was studying something related to Venn Diagrams. I had to search for a 4-set Venn Diagram, but suddenly gone through this following article by Danyal Tairoski in Medium titled "Why you can’t make a Venn Diagram with 4 Circles". I was amazed how elegant the article was. And for sure now I can say that I got to know why we can't have a 4-Set's Venn Diagram with circles but definitely with Ellipse.
